Mercado Livre — Seller Copilot

0→1 Product Concept

Confiauto — used-car trust

An end-to-end product concept (with UI mockups) tackling fraud and pricing uncertainty in Brazil's R$-billions person-to-person used-car market: fair valuation, trust report, and escrow-secured deals.

Executable Side Project

CompetIA — competitive-intelligence digest

A build-it-yourself playbook for an automated weekly competitor brief, summarized by AI. Includes architecture, a weekend MVP plan (no-code & light-code), cost, and a 30/60/90 launch plan.

Fintech Strategy

Giro — embedded working capital

A Strategy & Special Projects proposal: turn a payments relationship into a credit engine for small businesses with cash-flow underwriting. Market case, mockups, illustrative unit economics, build-vs-partner, roadmap and KPIs.
